Purpose - FE dung de lam gi: Hien thi danh sach work center + equipment tren view Master > Work Centers (work-center-list-view.vue). Cung cap wcCode/capacity cho scheduler + LoadCell.minutesCapacity + bang tra ten process.

Response schema: Routing[] = {id, itemCode, stepNo, wcCode, processNameKo, standardStMin}

Purpose - FE dung de lam gi: Hien thi danh sach MPS tren view MPS > List (mps-list-view.vue). Nguon input cho scheduler khi khong co work_order (sourceType=FROM_MPS).

Action: Add - read aps_mps_plan. Map status_cd -> DRAFT/CONFIRMED/CANCELLED. Chon endDate = delivery_date hay plan_end_date (business confirm).

Purpose - FE dung de lam gi: Nguon input cho scheduler khi da co WO (sourceType=FROM_WORK_ORDER). Chua co UI list rieng - dung ngam qua /aps/run.
Response schema: WorkOrder[] = {id, woNo, mpsId, itemCode, wcCode, planQty, planStartDate, planEndDate, status}
Action: Add - read work_order + join item + workcenter + mps_plan. Map status PLANNED/SENT/CONFIRMED/FAILED -> PENDING/DONE. planStart/End derive tu min/max daily_plan.work_date.

Purpose - FE dung de lam gi: Trai tim MVP - nut RUN APS tren view APS > Work Plan (aps-work-plan-view.vue + filter-bar.vue). Chay backward-fill scheduler + material shortage + load classification + KPI. Tra ve full result de FE render bang WorkPlan + Gantt LoadCell + KPI cards.
Response schema: ApsRunResult = {run: {id, startedAt, finishedAt}, workPlans: WorkPlan[], loadCells: LoadCell[], kpi: {onTimeRatePct, materialShortageCount, overloadWcPct, planningRiskCount}} where WorkPlan = {id, runId, sourceType, workOrderNo, tmpPlanNo, orderNo, itemCode, itemNameKo, wcCode, processNameKo, planQty, planStartDate, planEndDate, deliveryDate, riskType, shortageQty, adjusted, originalStart, originalEnd, dailyPlans: [{date, qty, minutes}]} and LoadCell = {wcCode, cellDate, minutesLoaded, minutesCapacity, status}
Action: Add new /aps/run - rebuild daily_plan + material_shortage in cung transaction. runId = uuid4 ephemeral. Assemble workPlans nested dailyPlans[] group theo (mps_plan_id item_routing_id). LoadCells compute minutesLoaded = sum(planned_qty x work_time). Status 5 gia tri map o service.

Purpose - FE dung de lam gi: Nut APPLY ADJUSTMENTS tren view APS > Work Plan (filter-bar.vue). User drag/drop WorkPlan doi ngay -> recalc backward-fill + load + risk cho plan bi anh huong (co the cascade sang plan khac cung load cell) + tra full ApsRunResult moi.
Request schema: {runId: string, adjustments: [{planId: string, newStart: date, newEnd: date}]}
Response schema: Same ApsRunResult as /aps/run. adjusted=true va originalStart/originalEnd giu gia tri cu.
Action: Add - port thuat toan tu mock-scheduler.ts. Transactional. Can 3 cot audit tren aps_daily_plan (adjusted original_work_date original_planned_qty).

Response schema: ErpOutboxRow = {id, runId, action: CREATE_PURCHASE_REQUEST, payload: {planId, qty, note}, status: PENDING, createdAt, pushedAt: null, error: null}
Action: Add POST - insert vao purchase_request co san. Reuse cot sync_status/sent_at/response_json. Map APPLIED -> PENDING.
